title: Cosmos Atom — a Bohr-model atom with electrons orbiting a glowing nucleus in 3D
title_vi: Cosmos Atom — nguyên tử kiểu Bohr với electron quay quanh hạt nhân phát sáng trong 3D
summary: A glowing nucleus sits at the centre while electrons sweep three tilted elliptical orbit rings, hand-rolled 3D so each orbit and electron passes correctly in front of or behind the nucleus; electrons drag faint colour trails. Pure Canvas 2D, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. KEY TECHNIQUES: each ellipse lives in its own plane, rotated into 3D world space by per-ring Euler angles (rot3) so its z gives depth; the renderer draws back halves of all rings, then electrons with z<0, then the nucleus, then front halves and electrons with z>=0 — so depth ordering is correct with no WebGL. Electron angle = th0 + 2PI*u*period with INTEGER period (2,3,4), so every electron returns to its start at u=1, giving frame(0)==frame(LOOP). A mild perspective scale by depth and short back-sampled trails complete the look; nucleus and electrons drawn additively ('lighter') over a seeded starfield. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t). TUNE: N rings, R orbit size, ellipse b/a, per-ring tilt (ax,az), integer periods, trail SEG/sp, AC palette, LOOP.
summary_vi: Hạt nhân phát sáng nằm ở tâm trong khi các electron quét ba vòng quỹ đạo elip nghiêng; 3D tự dựng nên mỗi quỹ đạo và electron đi đúng phía trước hoặc phía sau hạt nhân, electron kéo vệt màu mờ. Thuần Canvas 2D, không lib, chạy offline; deterministic & loop liền.
notes: Mỗi elip xoay vào không gian 3D bằng góc Euler riêng; sắp xếp độ sâu theo z (vẽ nửa sau, electron z<0, hạt nhân, nửa trước, electron z>=0); period nguyên nên loop liền mạch.
